cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_providers.go-505-// absolute ceiling. Returns nil when nothing usable is published.

data.text: `personaConnectionFrom` and the reset helper currently look test-only; `RecordHarnessRateLimit` still has a production caller path in the provider quota resolver. I’m checking the server bootstrap and the exact helper definitions before deciding whether to wire or delete.

`NewResolver` and the two reset helpers appear to have no in-repo references beyond their own definitions or generated glue, which means this bead may be mostly a cleanup pass with one real production wiring point: `RecordHarnessRateLimit`. I’m reading the surrounding code to confirm what can be safely deleted versus what must stay wired.

There are no in-tree call sites for `personaConnectionFrom` or the reset helpers, so those are likely obsolete utilities. I’m checking generated GraphQL glue and server bootstrap to see whether `NewResolver` is a real production constructor that simply isn’t referenced by a string search, or whether it too is dead.
